name: volmarket-api
description: Root package for Vercel serverless functions in /api (the static frontend builds from frontend-react/ — see vercel.json).
comment: overrides.uuid is REQUIRED: @solana/web3.js -> rpc-websockets pulls uuid@14 (ESM-only), whose CJS require() crashes the /api/fund CommonJS serverless function on Vercel with ERR_REQUIRE_ESM. Pin uuid to 9.x (dual CJS/ESM) so require() works. Do NOT set "type":"module" here — it breaks the frontend vite build (readFile crash). Re-test /api/fund on a deploy before changing.
